creator: kenji@k2r.org
text:
Created attachment 184170
Patch for patch/patch-Makefile

files/patch-Makefile in
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/math/calc/files/patch-Makefile?r1=408684&r2=445096
does not have a necessary patch for environment variable "CP" for CAL_PASSDOWN.
The attached patch fixes it. Tested on amd64 11.1-PRERELEASE r320521.
